description: Define and validate the public runtime/build configuration needed by the Vite patient app. Scope: Cognito user pool/client identifiers, public app/site URL, API path/base behavior, stage label, and any feature flags for patient surfaces. Ensure sensitive values such as Stripe/MDI/API secrets are never exposed to Vite. Decide whether config is compile-time VITE_* vars, a generated static config JSON, or a hybrid. Acceptance criteria: missing required public config fails build/dev startup clearly; no private secrets appear in built assets; staging and production can use distinct values; documentation explains how config reaches the frontend.
title: Add public environment config for Vite patient app
